_notes: Each entry's `id` matches a glTF Animation clip name in the GLB. The runtime's player.play_animation(id) loads the matching THREE.AnimationAction. fps is 24 (Blender scene fps); duration is the clip's natural length in seconds.

crank_rotation.description: All 4 crank throws rotate around the crank axis. Two full revolutions over the clip (one 4-stroke cycle).
crank_rotation.use_when: Showing the crankshaft turning, or as the master 'engine running' visual.

fan_spin.description: Front cooling fan rotates around its hub. Six revolutions over the clip - visibly faster than the crank.
fan_spin.use_when: Showing the cooling system or as ambient motion in a wide shot.

piston_1A_stroke.description: Cylinder 1, bank A piston reciprocates over one full cycle.

piston_1B_stroke.description: Cylinder 1, bank B piston reciprocates over one full cycle.

composability._note: Play all of engine_running_set in parallel for the full V8 cycle. The piston phases are pre-baked so they cycle as a group.
